## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] If user-facing strings changed: both `lib/i18n/dictionaries/it.ts` and `en.ts` updated
- [ ] If `// CUSTOMIZE:` markers were touched: highlighted in the description so adopters know
- [ ] No secrets, real emails, or personal workout data committed
- [ ] No new `console.log` or token-leaking logs in production paths
